cover.text: 高考前，我妈给我买了一套苹果三件套

safe_area_rules.top_status_bar: avoid top 12% for small critical details; title can sit below status bar
safe_area_rules.right_buttons: avoid right 18% for faces and key text
safe_area_rules.bottom_ui: avoid bottom 22% for all key text

cover.visual: A warm handwritten Douyin cover: a high-school girl in a simple uniform sits at a desk before gaokao, looking at three ordinary apples with small paper notes. Her old cracked phone lies beside admission ticket and pencils. Mother is softly visible in the kitchen doorway. No final text generated by model; leave upper-left paper-like blank area for title overlay.
cover_text_options: 高考前，妈妈送我苹果三件套
我妈买不起流行的三件套
三个苹果，陪我走进考场

panels.visual: Classroom before gaokao. Several students excitedly discuss Apple devices on desks while the heroine lowers her eyes and hides an old cracked phone into her schoolbag. Keep right side and bottom clean for platform UI.
Left panel: classmate happily takes notes on a shiny tablet. Right panel: heroine writes carefully on cheap draft paper with an old pen, smiling gently. No mockery, no villain.
Small kitchen at night. Mother washes dishes and asks carefully about the price. Daughter stands at the doorway, startled and embarrassed. Warm lamp, ordinary home, tender silence.

panels.beat: The daughter tries to protect mother
panels.visual: Three small moments: daughter's surprised face; mother's wet hand paused over bowl; daughter's forced relaxed smile saying it was only a joke. Keep generated image text-free.

Desk in early morning. Three real apples arranged like precious gifts, three blank sticky notes, admission ticket, pencils, warm lamp. Leave notes blank for post-rendered text or tiny decorative marks only.

panels.text_zone: top-left story text, individual small note areas blank
panels.visual: Three close-up panels: one red apple for safety, one bright apple for happiness, one slightly unusual apple near a small magnifying glass or open notebook to symbolize curiosity. Notes remain blank for post-rendered text.
Four-panel sequence: girl complains apple is heavy; walks to stairwell; pauses; secretly puts apple back into backpack. Cute restrained expressions, no bottom text.

Rainy gaokao exam site outside school gate. Mother stands at the back of crowd with wet shoes, holding a transparent plastic bag containing an apple. Daughter is far away near gate or implied. Emotional wide shot.

After gaokao dinner at a modest family table. Father and mother have cooked the daughter's favorite dishes. The family eats together under warm light. The table is ordinary but full, tender and homey, not luxurious.
Collage of small objects: mother's leave request note, wet cloth shoes, convenience-store receipt, umbrella, untouched apple, exam admission ticket corner. No readable generated text.

Years later, young woman at university dorm or first workplace desk places a fresh apple beside laptop and an old exam keepsake photo. Warm morning light, quiet understanding, mother-daughter memory implied.
